# datadog_dashboard_secure_embed (Resource)

Manages a Datadog secure embed shared dashboard. NOTE: The HMAC `credential` is only returned by the API once on creation and is stored in Terraform state. Ensure your state backend uses encryption at rest and has appropriate access controls.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `dashboard_id` (String) The ID of the dashboard to create a secure embed for.
- `title` (String) Title of the secure embed share.

### Optional

- `global_time_live_span` (String) The live span for the global time, e.g. `1h`, `4h`, `1d`, `2d`, `1w`. Defaults to `"1h"`.
- `global_time_selectable` (Boolean) Whether viewers can change the global time range. Defaults to `true`.
- `selectable_template_vars` (Block List) Template variables that viewers can filter by. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--selectable_template_vars))
- `status` (String) Status of the secure embed. Valid values are `active` and `paused`. Defaults to `"active"`.
- `viewing_preferences_high_density` (Boolean) Whether to display the dashboard in high density mode. Defaults to `false`.
- `viewing_preferences_theme` (String) Display theme for the embedded dashboard. Valid values are `system`, `dark`, `light`. Defaults to `"system"`.

### Read-Only

- `credential` (String, Sensitive) The HMAC credential granting access to this secure embed. Only available on initial creation; stored in state.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `token` (String) The share token for the secure embed.
- `url` (String) The public URL for the embedded dashboard.

<a id="nestedblock--selectable_template_vars"></a>
### Nested Schema for `selectable_template_vars`

Required:

- `name` (String) The name of the template variable.

Optional:

- `default_values` (List of String) The default values for this template variable.
- `prefix` (String) The tag prefix for this template variable. Defaults to `""`.
- `type` (String) The type of the template variable. Defaults to `""`.
- `visible_tags` (List of String) The visible tag values for this template variable.
